name: JJK - WLAWDJ
description:
"We listen and we don't judge!"

Yes the fuck we are cause what do you mean you like eating your toenails, Yuji?

So basically I'm trying to make bots, but I honestly have no clue if you guys like them, but my last one did well, and I'm bored, so I'll make another comedy one. Hopefully you guys like this one.

I have no clue how this game will operate, I tried to teach it how to play.

art creds: I couldn't find the OP bro please don't go off on me in the reviews 😭
